checks.name: Server Lifecycle Rule
checks.description: Server must be created exactly once per test file in beforeAll, never in beforeEach
checks.violation: Server created in beforeEach (N × test count)

checks.name: Connection Management Rule
checks.description: No manual connectionManager connect/disconnect calls inside tests
checks.fix: Remove connection calls; connections are global during test run

checks.name: Server Teardown Rule
checks.description: app.close() must only be in final afterAll, not in afterEach
checks.violation: app.close() called in afterEach (breaks subsequent tests)
checks.fix: Move app.close() to final afterAll; use data cleanup in afterEach

checks.name: Zero-State Validity Rule
checks.description: Tests must not rely on implicit global seeded state or previous test execution
checks.violation: Test assumes data from seed or previous tests
checks.fix: Each test must explicitly create its required data

checks.name: Per-Test Data Cleanup
checks.description: Tests should clean up their data after completion
checks.fix: Add afterEach block with prisma.table.deleteMany() for all tables used

principle_vii_rules.rule_1: Server creation MUST be in beforeAll, NEVER in beforeEach
principle_vii_rules.rule_2: Database connections are process-global; NEVER call connect/disconnect in tests
principle_vii_rules.rule_3: app.close() MUST be in final afterAll, NEVER in afterEach
principle_vii_rules.rule_4: Tests MUST NOT rely on implicit seeded state; create own data

server_in_beforeEach.impact: Creates N new servers (one per test), causes interference and resource leaks

connection_management_in_tests.impact: Breaks connection management; other tests lose database access

app_close_in_afterEach.impact: Closes server for all subsequent tests in suite
app_close_in_afterEach.fix: Move to final afterAll block; use data deletion in afterEach

implicit_seed_assumptions.impact: Tests fail if seed doesn't run; order-dependent failures
implicit_seed_assumptions.fix: Explicitly create required data in each test
